---
title: "Coursework"
description: "Relevant coursework and academic work."
---

## Coursework

This section will document Arturo's academic work in **International Business & Marketing** at California State Polytechnic University, Pomona, along with prior business coursework from Mt. San Antonio College.

The goal of this page is to connect classroom learning to professional strengths: customer insight, communication, marketing strategy, sales, analytics, and project coordination.

## Current Academic Focus

- **International Business & Marketing** - market awareness, business communication, strategy, and customer value
- **Business Administration foundation** - management, operations, communication, and organizational problem solving
- **Social and Behavioral Sciences foundation** - understanding people, behavior, decision-making, and community context

## Coursework Portfolio Slots

Use these sections to add assignments, reflections, or project summaries later:

::: {.content-grid}
::: {.content-card}
### Marketing Strategy

Add projects related to target markets, positioning, competitive analysis, brand strategy, or customer segmentation.
:::

::: {.content-card}
### Business Communication

Add presentations, written reports, client-style recommendations, or examples of professional communication.
:::

::: {.content-card}
### International Business

Add work related to global markets, cultural considerations, international trade, or business expansion.
:::

::: {.content-card}
### Operations & Project Work

Add coursework involving planning, process improvement, coordination, stakeholder communication, or timelines.
:::
:::
